overview.title: Description
overview.content: This website is developed as a personal project, aiming to provide a convenient and easy online shopping platform for both administrators (Admin) and users (customers). This project offers flexibility in management and use, from maintaining and developing the system to creating a smooth experience for users.

features_list.feature_description: The system clearly assigns authorization between Admin and customers. Admin has the right to control the entire system, including managing users, products, and orders. Meanwhile, customers can access, search, and purchase products online.

features_list.feature_name: Product search and detail viewing feature
features_list.feature_description: The website supports a powerful search feature, allowing customers to easily search for products by name, category, or feature. In addition, users can view detailed information about each product, including description, price, and purchasing options.

Customers can make payments quickly and securely through various methods. Admins have the right to approve and manage orders, and track order status from the time of placing until successful delivery.

Admins have full control over the system, including adding, editing, deleting products, tracking and processing orders, as well as managing users. In addition, Admins can monitor statistics and reports to make appropriate decisions in system development.

overview.title: Description
overview.content: This website is developed as a personal project, aiming to provide a convenient and easy online shopping platform for both administrators (Admin) and users (customers). This project offers flexibility in management and use, from maintaining and developing the system to creating a smooth experience for users.

features_list.feature_description: A clear and flexible authorization system helps distinguish the functions of Admin and customers.
Chatbot supports customers in answering questions and guiding users during the shopping process.
The website provides features for searching, viewing product details, ordering and easy payment.
Admin can manage products, orders, users and track statistical reports.

overview.title: Description
overview.content: Website supporting TOEIC test preparation with mock tests, points to redeem gifts and knowledge exchange space.

features_list.feature_description: A clear authorization system between user groups (Admin, Lecturer, Student), helping to manage and allocate access rights reasonably.
Integrated smart Chatbot helps users answer frequently asked questions, provide information about exams and study materials.
The registration and login features help users easily create accounts and access the system.
Users can search for exams by topic, difficulty and exam time, helping them plan and prepare best.

features_list.feature_name: Take exams, accumulate points and redeem gifts
features_list.feature_description: Users can accumulate points and receive attractive gifts when achieving high achievements.
The forum facilitates users to exchange, discuss and share experiences about exams and learning strategies.
Admin can create, edit and delete exams to ensure the content is always suitable for learning requirements.
The system helps Admin track students' scores and distribute gifts to encourage their participation.
Admin has the right to manage the entire system, including users, exams, gifts and other resources.
